summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SOMA-ID backend APIs and frontend UI. All 18 backend tests passed (11 from previous + 7 new catalog tests). Frontend tested successfully: landing page, auth flow, sandbox mode, ConversationRecorder with all 6 tabs (Briefing, Áudio Live, Foto/Upload, Planta Baixa, Áudio, PDF), and language switcher (PT/EN/ES).

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 404 errors for Supabase tables (public.modules, public.materials) - app correctly falls back to local mock data. Not critical - app functions normally.

issues: Warning banner about 'MODO DE FALLBACK ATIVADO' displayed - Google Apps Script URL not configured. This is expected for sandbox/development mode.

action_items: Optional: Configure Google Apps Script URL to remove fallback mode warning
Optional: Run Supabase SQL seed to populate modules and materials tables (app works with fallback/mock data)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API is fully functional with all Gemini endpoints working via Emergent Integration
DXF Service (/app/services/dxfService.ts) has industrial-grade implementation with proper layer management, drilling points, and lint validation
Layout Service (/app/services/layoutService.ts) properly generates SVG layouts for module visualization
All catalog endpoints (/api/catalog/modules, /api/catalog/materials) working correctly with MongoDB source
Frontend has complete i18n support for PT/EN/ES with TranslationContext
ConversationRecorder has all 6 tabs working: Briefing, Áudio Live, Foto/Upload, Planta Baixa, Áudio, PDF
Language switcher in navbar functions correctly with immediate UI updates

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing page, Auth, Dashboard, ConversationRecorder tabs, Language switcher all working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_pytest_client status check entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests are in /app/tests/test_soma_api.py and /app/tests/test_catalog_api.py. All 18 tests pass. Frontend uses TranslationContext for i18n (PT/EN/ES). Auth page has data-testid attributes. Dashboard shows fallback mode warning which is expected. ConversationRecorder has 6 tabs for different input types. DXF Service at /app/services/dxfService.ts has industrial implementation with layer management and lint validation.
